name: jsonresume-theme-even
when_to_use: 需要把标准 resume.json 一步排成带 print 间距、分页控制与明暗配色的完整简历 HTML 时用它而非手写,因为原生在分栏密度、跨页断行和打印样式上失败;非做简历编辑器或多主题选择器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能拼出约 60% 可用的简历 HTML,做不到稳定控制 CSS grid 密度、page-break、打印背景与长条目跨页;该主题把 canonical JSON Resume 直接闭环成可打印文档。

data_in.note: data.resume 直接传给上游 render(resume),必须是 JSON Resume 对象;render 返回含 doctype、head、内联主题 CSS 与 body 的完整 HTML 字符串。
data_in._why_no_example: resume.json 是 AI 原生 JSON 记法且字段语义稳定,schema 足以校准输入,不附 minimal example。

basics.name: string —— 必填姓名
basics.label?: string —— 默认不显示职业标题
basics.url?: string —— 默认不显示个人网址
basics.summary?: string（可含 Markdown）—— 默认不显示简介
basics.location?: JSON Resume location 对象 —— 默认不显示地点

resume.meta?: JSON Resume meta;meta.themeOptions.colors 可覆盖配色,默认使用主题内置明暗色

spec.note: boot 的文档预览 iframe 默认显式高 900px 并内部滚动,AI 可改成其他像素值;禁止 vh 或百分比高。打印时以主题自己的 print CSS 为准。

carriers.widget: conditional:iframe 必须挂进 shadowRoot;主题 HTML 会请求 Google Fonts,字体 CDN 未放行时回退系统字体但布局仍可读
carriers.codex: conditional:ESM CDN + iframe srcdoc 可用;外部 Google Fonts 受限时仅发生字体回退

isolation.evidence: render(resume):string is a pure string builder (no DOM). Theme CSS is embedded inside the returned full HTML document, which the boot mounts via iframe srcdoc so it lands in the iframe head, never the host head. Output references external Google Fonts — blocked under widget CSP, degrades to system-font fallback (layout intact). Because render returns a whole document, it MUST use an iframe (can't inject a full doc into a shadow root); the iframe is placed into shadowRoot.

basics.name: Ada Lovelace
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Engineer focused on **reliable systems** and clear docs. Building tools that make hard things simple.

work.name: Analytical Engines Ltd
work.summary: Led the platform team building compute infrastructure.
highlights: Cut build times by **60%** across CI
Designed the plugin runtime used by 40+ teams

en.when_to_use: Use it to lay out a standard resume.json as complete resume HTML with print spacing, pagination control, and light/dark colors instead of building it by hand, which fails at column density, cross-page breaks, and print styles. Not for a resume editor or theme picker.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only assemble resume HTML that is about 60% usable and cannot reliably control CSS grid density, page-break behavior, print backgrounds, or long entries across pages; this theme closes canonical JSON Resume into a printable document.

data_in.note: data.resume is passed directly to upstream render(resume) and must be a JSON Resume object; render returns a complete HTML string containing doctype, head, inline theme CSS, and body.

basics.name: string -- Required full name
basics.label?: string -- Job title is hidden by default
basics.email?: string -- Email is hidden by default
basics.phone?: string -- Phone is hidden by default
basics.url?: string -- Personal URL is hidden by default
basics.summary?: string (may contain Markdown) -- Summary is hidden by default
basics.location?: JSON Resume location object -- Location is hidden by default

resume.meta?: JSON Resume meta; meta.themeOptions.colors can override the palette, which defaults to the theme's built-in light/dark colors

spec.note: The document-preview iframe in boot has an explicit default height of 900px with internal scrolling. AI may use another pixel value; vh and percentage heights are forbidden. Printing follows the theme's own print CSS.
